2159190.name: Virtual Sailor NG Additional Scenery and Boats
2159190.description:
This package contains the essential boats and scenery for Virtual Sailor NG
Additional boats and scenery can be downloaded from the web page and other pages.

The following boats are included:

HMAS_Anzac
Jim_Bickhoff
MS_Bremen
Musquidobit
Namoh
ORP_Jaskolka
Protis
Solar_Wind_mk2
Vestkysten
Adriatic
Bavaria40
BSMILOS
Goztepe
Hanse531

The following scenery is included:

Aegean_sea
caribbean
Manhattan
SW_europe_01
SW_europe_02
SW_europe_03
SW_europe_04
SW_europe_05
SW_europe_06
SW_europe_07
SW_europe_08
SW_europe_09
SW_europe_10
SW_europe_11

All scenery has at least one situation saved, you can select starting positions using the map, or edit situation in the program.
2159190.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
